mapper.sql: select property_fee_id, user_id, user_name, user_room, property_month, house_area, unit_price, total_fee, fee_status, due_date, payment_time, payment_no, overdue_amount, create_time, update_time, remark from community_property_fee
mapper.delete:
delete from community_property_fee where property_fee_id in
#{propertyFeeId}
